metadata.description: Plugins for HVAC and plumbing wholesale distributors using CoWork for Distributors. Built by Tenexity.

plugins.name: tenexity-setup-hvac-plumbing
plugins.description: Single-user setup plugin for HVAC and plumbing wholesale distributors. Bundles three skills (Onboarding Coach, System Review, First Week Guide) for solo distributors and small shops. For team deployments of 5+ employees, use the Tenexity Setup Team plugin instead.

plugins.name: tenexity-setup-team-hvac-plumbing
plugins.description: Multi-user setup plugin for HVAC and plumbing wholesale distributors deploying CoWork across a team of 5-50 employees. Bundles four skills: Setup Company (admin runs once, ~15 min), Setup User (per-employee, ~5 min), System Review, and First Week Guide. Two-layer architecture splits company-wide context from individual user info — admin populates COMPANY/ once, every employee inherits it.
